# TechPersona Studio

> Website redesign and lead automation for service businesses in Worcester, MA.

TechPersona Studio is a solo web design agency founded by Thao Phuong, a software engineer with 6 years of experience at tech companies in Boston. The studio specializes in website redesigns that convert visitors into leads, and lead automation systems (Quiet Systems) that respond to inquiries within minutes — targeted at local service businesses including restaurants, nail salons, plumbers, and realtors.

## Services

- Website Redesign: Conversion-focused builds with local SEO. One-time project fee, scoped before work begins. No ongoing retainer required.
- Quiet Systems: Automated lead response and after-hours messaging. Converts missed calls and form fills into booked appointments without manual follow-up. Available as an add-on or standalone service.

## Free Website Audit

TechPersona Studio offers a free website audit for local businesses. Submit a URL and receive a walkthrough within 2 business days. No purchase required.

## Location

Worcester, MA. Serves clients online everywhere.
